meta.title: Positioning Radar — Website Positioning Analysis
meta.description: Score your website's positioning across 6 key elements. See where you stand and where there's room to differentiate.

hero.title: Score your positioning across 6 key elements
hero.subtitle: Enter your URL — we'll analyze your website against competitors using the 6-element positioning model and show you exactly where you stand.

form.enterManually: I know my competitors — enter manually
form.industryHint: Leave empty to let AI detect automatically
form.competitorDiscoveryFailed: Couldn't find competitors automatically. Try again or enter them manually.

loading.fact1: 83% of B2B buyers say positioning clarity directly affects their purchase decision.
loading.fact2: Companies with clear positioning grow 2x faster than competitors.
loading.fact3: The average website visitor decides in 5 seconds if a company is relevant.
loading.fact4: Only 22% of companies are satisfied with their positioning.
loading.emailPrompt: Taking a while? We can email you the results.
loading.emailSent: We'll send you the results when ready!

results.title: Positioning Analysis
results.scoreDescription: How unique is each company's positioning relative to others

fiveSecondTest.title: 5 Second Test
fiveSecondTest.description: Would an outsider understand within 5 seconds what each company does and who it's for?

healthScore.title: Positioning Health Score
healthScore.description: Overall positioning strength based on 6 key elements

healthDetail.title: 6-Element Positioning Breakdown
healthDetail.description: Detailed scoring across MEOM's 6 positioning elements

redFlags.title: Red Flags
redFlags.description: Positioning problems detected from website messaging

emailGate.title: Unlock the full 6-element breakdown
emailGate.description: Enter your email to see detailed positioning scores and actionable recommendations.
emailGate.privacy: We'll only contact you about your positioning analysis.

cta.title: Want a deeper analysis with expert insights?
cta.description: Our positioning strategists will review your results, add industry context, and deliver concrete recommendations for standing out.
cta.thankYouDescription: We'll review your positioning analysis and get back to you with our expert insights within 2 business days.
cta.privacy: We'll only contact you about your positioning analysis.

privacy.notice: We analyze publicly available website content. Your URL and results are stored to provide this service.
privacy.intro: Positioning Radar is a service by MEOM Oy. This page describes what data we collect and how we use it.
privacy.dataCollected1: Website URLs you submit for analysis
privacy.dataCollected4: Your email address, if you choose to unlock the full report or request a deep analysis
privacy.dataCollected5: Your browser stores analysis history locally (localStorage) — this data never leaves your device
privacy.howUsed1: To generate and display your positioning analysis
privacy.howUsed2: To send you the full report or expert analysis, if requested
privacy.howUsed3: We do not sell or share your data with third parties
privacy.howUsed4: We do not use tracking cookies or analytics trackers
privacy.retention1: Analysis results are stored indefinitely so you can access them via their unique URL
privacy.retention2: You can request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us
privacy.contact: For data deletion requests or questions about privacy, contact us at

v3.title: Your Positioning Analysis
v3.gateDescription: Enter your email to unlock the competitive landscape — see where you stand among competitors.
v3.gatePrivacy: We'll only use this to send you the analysis.

reports.title: Positioning Reports
reports.subtitle: See how major brands position themselves — analyzed with our 6-element model.

crm.title: CRM Platforms
crm.description: How HubSpot, Salesforce, and Pipedrive position themselves in the crowded CRM market.

design.title: Design Tools
design.description: Figma vs Sketch vs Adobe XD — who wins the positioning game in design tools?

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Platforms
ecommerce.description: Shopify, WooCommerce, and BigCommerce — positioning strategies in online retail.
